correctedHistoricalCandidate.claimBoundary: Forward paper review candidate only; not alpha, profitability, fill proof, or permission to trade.

accept: Inactive v1 rule retained for audit only; it cannot produce an acceptance decision.
Mean net executable CLV is positive and its match-clustered 95% CI lower bound is above zero.
Mean settlement P&L is positive and the strategy beats no-trade and random-direction baselines.
Every registered fill, slippage, drawdown, and depth guardrail holds.
inconclusive: No active study exists; corrected v2 remains an engineering candidate until Deborah registers it.
Capture-only evidence cannot authorize model spend, paper admission, or real money.
reject: V1 was invalidated before observations because upstream selection used future information.
The executable CLV interval touches or falls below zero.

bounty.label: Preserved v1 bounty ledger
bounty.reason: Complete close and settlement evidence is required before endpoints are computed

longRun.label: Preserved v1 long-run ledger
longRun.reason: Long-run endpoints sealed until 20 filled matches and 40 fills

evaluation.primaryEndpoint: Executable CLV net of measured costs

syntheticProof.explanation: Closed-world production-component demo; separate from historical evidence and excluded from every performance claim.
syntheticProof.label: Synthetic full-lifecycle proving fixture
